caption: An older man with grey hair and glasses stands behind a brown wooden lectern, speaking into a black microphone. He wears a blue patterned button-down shirt accented with bright yellow and green horizontal stripes and a beaded necklace. He is positioned in front of a background of horizontal brown blinds. A logo featuring a stylized white shell and the text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the lectern and as an overlay on the right edge of the screen. In the foreground, the blurred tops of heads from an audience are visible. As the sequence progresses, the man maintains his position at the podium, looking down at papers on the lectern while speaking. His facial expression shifts slightly, and he moves his hands to adjust the documents before him.
